name: section
description: A titled, optionally collapsible container that groups fields / entries under a heading (v-next). Filament Section traits as server-pure variants: collapsible/collapsed (native details/summary), compact (tighter padding), divided (ruled header/body line), aside (header in a side rail). Four surface variants (default/outlined/elevated/ghost). A heading makes it a labelled landmark (aria-labelledby). Plain HTML + --lv-* tokens, zero JS, CSP-clean.
docs: Copies the section partial to your JTE root at lievit/section.jte, reached as @template.lievit.section(heading="...", content=@`...`). A non-collapsible section is a plain <section> + heading; pass collapsible=true (and collapsed=true to start closed) for a native <details> disclosure. compact tightens padding (--lv-space-3 vs --lv-space-4), divided rules a border-top between header and body, aside puts the header in a side rail grid. variant (default/outlined/elevated/ghost) tints the surface. The chevron rotate-on-open is opt-in via one adopter CSS rule keyed off [data-slot="section"][open] .lv-section-chevron; without it the section still opens + closes. Static ARIA goes in attrs; per-row dynamic data-* goes in dataAttrs (escaped). The source is yours: edit freely.
